notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
turn-001: P1 opened by taking both near-side centers while keeping the guardian and marksman tucked behind the runners.
turn-002: P2 sent both scouts into the southern lane and claimed west-south as the first rush foothold.
turn-003: P1 advanced toward the central band and recruited a second guardian as a delayed screen.
turn-004: P2 took center-south and recruited a raider to convert the rush into combat pressure.
turn-005: P1 claimed center-north and southeast, then added a druid for stabilizing printed healing.
turn-006: P2 moved the rush screen into the southeast lane and opened damage on P1’s forward scout.
turn-007: P1 took the exact center and damaged the nearest scout while recruiting another guardian.
turn-008: P2 focused fire and killed P1’s southeast scout, then recruited a fresh scout for continued tempo.
turn-009: P1 answered by killing the lead rush scout and recruiting a healer for the stretched line.
turn-010: P2 flipped southeast back and mauled P1’s center raider with the southern pocket.
turn-011: P1 stabilized after losing the raider by tightening the guardian wall and adding a marksman.
turn-012: P2 pulled the first raider back into threat range and refreshed the scout stream.
turn-013: P1 trapped and killed the first raider while keeping the marksmen behind the screen.
turn-014: P2 kept the southern centers and used a marksman shot to slow P1’s lead guardian.
